Cleanup actions:
- Updated result.granted_credit and validate_state in batches for all processed rows.
- Incremented host.total_credit and user.total_credit only for non-sentinel credits.
- Finalized orphaned outcome=5 / elapsed_time=0 rows with 0.01 denied sentinel so they do not remain perpetually uncredited.
- Updated website counters: credited_count.txt and total_results_count.txt.
- Live queue was drained repeatedly until the uncredited result count reached zero at session end.
